== Notes for [[Item:Q105553|Q105553]] ==

The Sanhedrin

[http://www.thesanhedrin.org/en/index.php?title=Historical_Overview '''The Sanhedrin - Historical Overview''']

ca. 30 progeny generations to: [https://www.geni.com/people/Rabbi-Yehudah-haNassi-I/6000000007307724757 '''Rabbi Shimon ben Yehuda HaNassi I - רבי שמעון בן רבי יהודה הנשיא''' ]

from [http://www.geni.com/people/Rabbi-Ovadyah-I-HaDayan/6000000007315823544 '''Rabbi Ovadyah I HaDayan רבי עובדיה הדיין'''] ancestor of '''Maimonides'''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000010964056996

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
